prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等专业在2024–2025年专业热度分析中均为"高热推荐"或"推荐"等级，与该校优势学科高度匹配，推高相关专业报考热度；陕西省2026年物理类考生约206500人，较2025年172468人增加约19.7%，考生规模大幅增长，竞争显著加剧；南京理工大学位于江苏省南京市，地处长三角核心城市，对陕西考生具有较强地域吸引力；该校在陕西招生计划占比较小（约130余人），属跨省招生，地域偏好因素对报考热度有正向作用。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次7169名、2026年计划小幅扩招3%、陕西省物理类考生大幅增长约19.7%以及学校声誉稳定、优势学科突出等因素，考生规模增长带来的竞争加剧效应显著超过扩招的缓解作用，预计2026年最低录取位次较2025年有所后移；预测最低位次约7327名，区间6827–7827名。

- 电子信息类（电子科学与技术、电子信息工程、光电信息科学与工程、通信工程）

- 自动化类（钱学森学院/大成创新人才班）。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间6827–7827名内，建议以二档专业为主力填报区间，一档专业（计算机类、电子信息类、兵器类鼎新班）作为冲刺，三档专业（化工与制药类、材料类）作为保底；位次明显优于区间下限（<6827名）可重点冲刺一档王牌专业；位次接近区间上限（>7827名）应以三档保底为主，谨慎填报一档专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science (physics category) were approximately 8892 → 9276 → 7080 → 6996 → 7169, showing a fluctuating trend of first decreasing and then increasing; from 2023 to 2024, rankings significantly moved forward (7080 → 6996), and in 2025, they slightly moved back to 7169. In the past two years, the fluctuation range was approximately 6996–7169, with the 2025 baseline ranking around 7169. The university's enrollment plan in Shaanxi for science (physics category) was 125 in 2021, 120 in 2022, 118 in 2023, 122 in 2024, 134 in 2025, and 138 in 2026, showing a continuous slight expansion trend; in 2026, it increased by 4 students (+3%) compared to 2025, with a limited expansion that has a weak effect on alleviating competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Nanjing University of Science and Technology is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; in the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, it ranked 37th in 2021, 33rd in 2022, 36th in 2023, 37th in 2024, 38th in 2025, and 36th in 2026, remaining stable in the 33–38 range in recent years, firmly among the top domestic 211 universities, with widely recognized educational level and comprehensive strength; its recent reputation evaluation is mainly neutral/mixed, with no obvious negative public opinion or record of enrollment gaps; its Douyin popularity total ranking is 65th, rated as "average", with short video platform exposure at a medium level, showing no abnormal increase in application attention; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Chemical Engineering and Technology was rated A+ (top in the country), and Optical Engineering, Control Science and Engineering, and Mechanical Engineering were rated A-; Armament Science and Technology is the university's traditional ace field, highly corresponding to the enrollment majors such as Armament, Detection Guidance and Control Technology, and Weapon Launch Engineering, which strongly attracts applications for related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation were rated as "highly recommended" or "recommended" in the 2024–2025 major popularity analysis, highly matching the university's advantageous disciplines, driving up application enthusiasm for related majors; in 2026, the number of physics category candidates in Shaanxi is approximately 206,500, an increase of about 19.7% compared to 172,468 in 2025, with a significant increase in candidate scale and intensified competition; Nanjing University of Science and Technology is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu Province, in the core city of the Yangtze River Delta, which has strong regional appeal to Shaanxi candidates; the university's enrollment plan in Shaanxi accounts for a small proportion (about 130 people), belonging to cross-provincial enrollment, and regional preference factors have a positive effect on application enthusiasm.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 7169, the 2026 plan for a slight expansion of 3%, a significant increase of about 19.7% in Shaanxi physics category candidates, and the university's stable reputation and outstanding advantageous disciplines, the intensification of competition due to the increase in candidate scale significantly outweighs the alleviation effect of expansion. It is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will move back compared to 2025; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 7327, with a range of 6827–7827.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Computer Science (Computer Science and Technology, Software Engineering, Intelligent Science and Technology)
- Electronic Information (Electronic Science and Technology, Electronic Information Engineering, Optoelectronic Information Science and Engineering, Communication Engineering)
- Armament (Dingxin Innovation Talent Class/Dacheng Innovation Talent Class)
- Automation (Qian Xuesen College/Dacheng Innovation Talent Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Automation (Rail Transit Signal and Control, Automation, Electrical Engineering and Automation, Smart Grid Information Engineering)
- Aircraft Design and Engineering
- Microelectronics Science and Engineering
- Mechanical (Vehicle Engineering, Industrial Engineering, Mechanical Engineering)
- Mathematics (Information and Computing Science, Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Applied Statistics).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Chemical and Pharmaceutical (Materials Chemistry, Polymer Materials and Engineering, Chemical Engineering and Technology, Applied Chemistry, Pharmaceutical Engineering)
- Materials (Materials Science and Engineering, Materials Physics, Nanomaterials and Technology, Materials Forming and Control Engineering)
- Engineering Mechanics (Aerospace Direction)
- Environmental Science and Engineering (Environmental Engineering, Bioengineering, Radiation Protection and Nuclear Safety).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 6827–7827, it is recommended to use Tier 2 majors as the main application range, Tier 1 majors (Computer Science, Electronic Information, Armament Dingxin Class) as a reach, and Tier 3 majors (Chemical and Pharmaceutical, Materials) as a safety; if your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<6827), you can focus on reaching for Tier 1 ace majors; if your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>7827), you should mainly rely on Tier 3 majors as safety and cautiously apply for Tier 1 majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts (history category) were approximately 2830 → 9319 → 3754 → 3487 → 3310, showing significant fluctuations; in 2022, the Japanese major caused an abnormal drop to 9319, and after excluding this anomaly, the rankings over the past three years show a slight upward trend (3754 → 3487 → 3310), with a baseline ranking of about 3310 for 2025; the university's enrollment plan for liberal arts (history category) in Shaanxi was 15 in 2021, 21 in 2022, 24 in 2023, 22 in 2024, 17 in 2025, and 30 in 2026; compared to 2025, 2026 sees a significant increase of 13 students (+76.5%), with a notable expansion that alleviates competitive pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Nanjing University of Science and Technology is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university; it ranks 36th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, consistently within the 33–38 range in recent years, firmly among the top domestic 211 institutions, with widely recognized academic standing; its recent reputation evaluations are mainly neutral/mixed, with no significant negative public opinion or enrollment gaps; its Douyin popularity ranks 65th overall, rated as 'average', indicating stable application attention; the university's liberal arts majors mainly include linguistics, Marxist theory, English, social work, public administration, and Japanese; Marxist theory is rated A- (fifth round), and foreign language and literature related to linguistics is rated B+, providing some support for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Liberal arts majors (language studies, Marxist theory, social work, etc.) have generally stable and slightly cool social popularity, with no clear signs of warming; in 2026, the number of history category examinees in Shaanxi is about 88,500, an increase of about 17.0% from 75,641 in 2025, intensifying competition due to candidate growth; Nanjing University of Science and Technology is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu Province, in the core city of the Yangtze River Delta, which has strong regional appeal for Shaanxi liberal arts candidates; the university's enrollment plan for liberal arts in Shaanxi is relatively small (about 17–30 students), making it a cross-provincial enrollment, and regional preference factors positively influence application popularity.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 3310, the significant 76.5% enrollment expansion in 2026, the approximately 17.0% increase in Shaanxi history category examinees, and the stable university reputation, the expansion effect significantly outweighs the candidate growth effect, so the minimum admission ranking in 2026 is expected to drop noticeably compared to 2025; the predicted minimum ranking is about 4809, with a range of 4309–5309.
